briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to wrap a given key using a specified AES wrapping key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyWrapParams structure which holds the parameters of key wrap input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Set the command ID based on SHA type.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to unwrap a given key using a specified AES wrapping key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KeyWrapParams structure which holds the parameters of key wrap input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Set the command ID based on SHA type.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform Key Wrap Unwrap Known Answer Tests (KAT's).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for key wrap unwrap module.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ss 02/24/25 Initial release 1.1 kd 07/23/25 Fixed gcc warnings
